question: The chart shows regional sales share. According to the percentage labels, which region has the highest market share?

options.A: North has the highest market share among the regions.
options.B: West has the highest market share among the regions.
options.C: South has the highest market share among the regions.
options.D: East and Central together have the highest market share.

explanation: From the labels, North has the highest share (47%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking West is largest when relying on visual comparison.
